title: Bar Bigha heat wave
lead: Bar Bigha is experiencing a severe heat wave with a Z-Score of +3.29. The city's score of 10.0/10 indicates a critical level event.
body:
The current heat wave in Bar Bigha has a Z-Score of +3.29, indicating a significant anomaly. 
 The score of 10.0/10 and level of CRITICAL suggest extreme conditions. 
 The high temperature is accompanied by an umidita of 72% and vento of 12.8 km/h, with CDD at 10.5 GG and HDD at 0.0 GG.
conclusion: Activate emergency response protocols immediately due to the critical heat wave conditions.
